title: Simple Cupcake with Cherry Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this easy simple cupcake with cherry coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Cupcakes were originally called 'number cakes' or '1234 cakes' because the recipes were measured in cups to make them easy to remember.
The first cupcake recipe was published in an American cookbook in 1796, baked in small earthenware cups.
